questionHtml:
The graph shows the variation with distance of a horizontal force acting on an object. The object, initially at rest, moves horizontally through a distance of 50 m.

A constant frictional force of 2.0 N opposes the motion. What is the final kinetic energy of the object after it has moved 50 m?

A. 100 J

B. 500 J

C. 600 J

D. 1100 J
